## Type of change

- [ ] 🎓 New / updated certification config
- [ ] 📝 New / corrected learning content (questions, flashcards, cheat sheets)
- [ ] ✨ Feature
- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix
- [ ] 🧹 Refactor / chore
- [ ] 📚 Docs

## Content PRs only

- [ ] Every fact is backed by an **official source** (linked below)
- [ ] Question explanations say *why* each correct answer is right
- [ ] `domainId`s match the certification config
- [ ] Bumped the content pack `version`

Sources:

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run typecheck` passes
- [ ] `npm run lint` passes
- [ ] `npm test` passes
- [ ] `npm run build` passes
- [ ] I tested the change in the browser (light + dark mode if UI)
